name: Fore Real 24
address: 3403 Horse Pen Creek Rd, Greensboro, NC 27410
about: Fore Real 24 is an indoor golf simulator venue in Greensboro, NC, offering 24/7 access and state-of-the-art equipment. The facility features a dynamic hitting area that changes to match course contours, a ball-return/auto-tee system, and a library of over 300 courses. With public tee times available from 10am-10pm and membership options for unlimited access, it caters to both casual players and serious golfers. The venue also hosts leagues, competitions, and special events, providing a comprehensive indoor golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access and priority booking for members
Dynamic hitting area that adapts to course contours
State-of-the-art Golfzon simulators with a 300+ course library
Ball-return and auto-tee system for more practice time
Flexible membership tiers with guest options

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided about food service
No information provided about alcohol service; BYOB policy not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Official simulator of the U.S. Open and U.S. Women's Open; named 'Most Innovative & Exciting New Tech' by Golf Inc.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks, as the venue does not mention on-site food and beverage service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate for playing 18 holes is provided, but the facility offers unlimited 1-3 hour tee times depending on membership tier.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes juniors/youth. The Silver and Gold memberships are designed for parent/child and group play, with accommodations for up to 6 players per bay.
